lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and rust. The interior is heavily worn and requires cleaning. Mechanical systems need repair to be fully functional.
Mint condition.

Looking for a dependable ride at a great value? This car is in fair condition and ready to hit the road! It shows some honest wear from its years of service, but it remains a solid and functional choice for anyone needing reliable transportation. It’s been a faithful companion and is now looking for a new home where it can continue to serve well. This is a fantastic opportunity to own a quality vehicle at a very accessible price point!

This vehicle is in fair condition and is best suited for someone looking for a dependable commuter rather than a showpiece. The exterior has several cosmetic imperfections, including a few noticeable scratches on the passenger side and a small dent on the rear bumper. Inside, the upholstery shows some wear and staining consistent with regular use, and some of the plastic trim pieces are slightly loose. Mechanically, the car starts and runs well, though it may eventually require some routine maintenance like new brake pads or a suspension refresh to be perfect. It’s a solid, honest car that reflects its age and mileage, offered at a price that accounts for its current state.

The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has several visible scratches and a few small dents. The interior shows signs of regular use, including some wear on the seats and minor staining. The engine and mechanical systems are functional, though they will require scheduled maintenance and minor repairs soon.

This vehicle is in pristine, showroom condition and has been meticulously maintained since day one. The exterior paint is flawless with no scratches, chips, or dings, and the interior remains in perfect state, showing absolutely no signs of wear. Mechanically, the car is perfect; it drives exactly as it did the day it left the factory, with all systems functioning flawlessly and no upcoming maintenance required. It has always been garaged, never driven in inclement weather, and comes with a complete, documented service history. This is a rare find for a buyer seeking a vehicle in truly exceptional, like-new condition.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of performance and long-term value. Meticulously maintained and demonstrating robust mechanical integrity, this model offers a refined driving experience. Every aspect of this vehicle has been curated to meet our exacting standards for roadworthiness and aesthetic appeal. Secure a vehicle that exemplifies reliability and sophisticated engineering.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty car that’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has plenty of life left in it for its next owner. It runs great and has been well-taken care of—perfect for anyone looking for a reliable ride that still looks awesome on the road. Come take it for a spin!

Offered is a mechanically sound E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54 inline-six powerplant. This unit delivers exceptional throttle response via its six individual throttle bodies, paired with a tactile Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission. Key preventative maintenance has been addressed, including a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rear subframe reinforcement to ensure structural rigidity under lateral load. The factory limited-slip differential provides predictable lock-up, while the suspension geometry remains tight with recent bushing refreshes. While displaying minor aesthetic patina indicative of its driver-focused history, the powertrain remains robust and meticulously serviced. A compelling acquisition for the purist seeking analog feedback and an 8,000 RPM redline.
Used vehicle. Reliable performance. Routine maintenance complete. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and daily utility. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, complemented by clear lenses and well-preserved trim, showing only the minor road wear expected of a carefully driven car. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the upholstery is supple with minimal wear, and every electronic feature—from the premium sound system to the dual-zone climate control—functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is in robust health, featuring a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that has benefited from a consistent, documented maintenance schedule. With firm braking, precise steering, and tires that offer plenty of remaining tread, this car is fully prepared for its next owner to drive away with complete confidence.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a sophisticated driving experience, combining mechanical integrity with refined aesthetic appeal. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure optimal performance, this specimen stands as a testament to diligent ownership and remains in commendable condition. It represents an exceptional acquisition for the discerning buyer seeking a reliable, high-caliber motorcar.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, offering a refined driving experience and proven reliability. This example displays consistent mechanical integrity and a preserved interior, reflecting a history of diligent care and professional upkeep. It represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a sophisticated balance of performance and long-term value. Available now for immediate acquisition.

Hey there! 🚗 I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s been absolutely wonderful to own. It’s in great shape, super reliable, and has plenty of life left for its next adventure! I’ve taken really good care of it, so you can just hop in and go. If you're looking for a solid, well-loved car that’s ready for the road, this is the one for you. Let's get you behind the wheel!

Good condition. Runs well. Routine maintenance complete. Clean title.

This vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday utility. Finished in a sophisticated Deep Obsidian Black, the exterior remains glossy and well-preserved, showing only minor surface imperfections and small stone chips consistent with responsible road use. Inside, you'll find a smoke-free cabin appointed with supple cream leather seats that have held their shape beautifully, though the driver’s side displays characteristic light creasing. Every feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the high-fidelity sound system and panoramic sunroof, is fully operational. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and has been meticulously maintained with a complete service history available for review. Recent maintenance includes a fresh oil service and a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity. The alloy wheels are wrapped in tires with approximately 60% tread life remaining. This is a dependable, well-cared-for car that offers a premium driving experience without the new-car price tag.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a superior standard of pre-owned excellence. Demonstrating consistent mechanical care and a refined aesthetic, it offers a balanced combination of performance and longevity. This is an optimal acquisition for the professional seeking a reliable, high-caliber automobile.
